top_signals.title: Working-class Rayo Vallecano defies the odds to contest first European final
top_signals.summary: From the narrow streets of Vallecas to a European final in Leipzig, Rayo Vallecano has turned a season of conflict and resilience into the biggest night in its history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
